title: Domain Das
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Family |image= |name=Domain Das |type=[[Domain]]''[[The New Jedi Order: Dark Tide II: Ruin]]'' |species=[[Yuuzhan Vong]] |first= |head= |relatives= |origin= |locations= |early= |prominence=[[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]]''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' |fragmented= |restored= |extinct= |affiliation=[[Warrior caste]] }} {{Quote|Leader, there was nothing we could do.''"
"''Wrong, Runck of Domain Das. You could have been faster.|Runck Das and Shedao Shai|}} '''Domain Das''' was a [[Domain]] among the [[Warrior caste]] of the [[Yuuzhan Vong]]. One warrior of Domain Das, [[Runck Das]], served under [[Commander]] [[Shedao Shai]] in [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]] during the early days of the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]] and took part in the [[Battle of Garqi]], where the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Corran Horn/Legends|Corran Horn]], [[Ganner Rhysode]] and [[Darth Caedus|Jacen Solo]] successfully escaped despite the efforts of Das' direct superior, [[Krag Val]]. When Das returned with news of what happened there for the Commander, Shai [[Death/Legends|killed]] [[Gender/Legends|him]] for his and Val's failures. ==Behind the scenes== Domain Das first appeared in the [[2000]] novel ''[[The New Jedi Order: Dark Tide II: Ruin]]'' written by [[Michael A. Stackpole]]. ==Appearances== *''[[The New Jedi Order: Dark Tide II: Ruin]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Domäne Das |es=Dominio Das |pt=Domínio Das }} [[Category:Yuuzhan Vong Domains|Das]]
